title: Why the full opening
wikitext:
[]: Why the full opening?             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sat Oct 29, 2016 3:11 pm I'm pretty sure this is official, but I'm not sure why they made a full version of the opening full of spoilers (including EoE ones) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3haLgCvWUu0 the editing is dope though.

[]: Re: Why the full opening?             Quote Post by Director Black » Sat Oct 29, 2016 3:17 pm It is a great...music video. It's one that was included on one of the Japanese Eva DVD collections.

[]: Re: Why the full opening?             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sat Oct 29, 2016 3:21 pm Yeah I thought it was official. They did a great job emulating the style of the opening... if it wasn't the same editors, you could have fooled me

[]: Re: Why the full opening?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 29, 2016 3:24 pm The 4-minute full OP comes from the Renewal "Test Type" DVD. There was a similarly extended ED as well .

[]: Re: Why the full opening?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 29, 2016 8:39 pm The 01 TEST-TYPE DVD was, by the way, a release targeted at fans promoting the remastered (or Renewal version) series. It included the entire remastered episode 01 (which was quite a sight to behold at the time) along with the two music videos produced by Masayuki (a.k.a. Anno's other right-hand man and director of Death ).

[]: Re: Why the full opening?             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Mon Oct 31, 2016 10:31 pm Oh. a promotional makes sense. Also, why'd you let evacommentary.org go down? D:
